## Communication Plan

### Regular Meetings

| Meeting Type | Frequency | Participants | Purpose |
|--------------|-----------|--------------|---------|
| Leadership Sync | Daily | Leadership Team | Strategic alignment |
| Team Leads Sync | Daily | All Team Leads | Coordination |
| Cross-Team Sync | Weekly | All Teams | Progress review |
| Engine Sync | Weekly | Engine Specialists | Technical coordination |

### Communication Channels

| Channel | Purpose | Participants | Frequency |
|---------|---------|--------------|----------|
| Leadership | Strategic decisions | Leadership Team | As needed |
| Team Leads | Coordination | All Team Leads | Daily |
| Cross-Team | Cross-team issues | Affected teams | As needed |
| Engine-Specific | Engine issues | Engine specialists | As needed |

### Documentation

| Document Type | Owner | Update Frequency | Location |
|---------------|-------|------------------|----------|
| Coordination Plan | Producer | Weekly | Project docs |
| Team Status | Team Leads | Daily | Project docs |
| Issues Log | Producer | As needed | Project docs |
| Decisions Log | Producer | As needed | Project docs |

| Task | Dependent Team | Dependencies | Coordination Notes |
|------|---------------|--------------|-------------------|
| | | | |

### Conflict Resolution

### Escalation Paths

1. **Team Level**: Resolve within team
2. **Team Lead Level**: Escalate to team leads
3. **Producer Level**: Escalate to producer
4. **Leadership Level**: Escalate to leadership team
5. **User Level**: Final decision by user

### Coordination Quality Gates
